summary: Bug fixes verified successfully. All 3 bugs fixed: 1) Customer push notification token key (customerToken), 2) Customer profile API URL (/api/customer/profile), 3) PWA install banners exist with correct data-testid attributes. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: Customer login, session persistence, profile fetch, and change password all working.

minor.issue: Fixed - was missing jwt import and JWT_SECRET/JWT_ALGORITHM imports in push.py

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: /app/backend/routes/push.py - Added missing imports: jwt, JWT_SECRET, JWT_ALGORITHM from deps

mr.note: MR credentials may not be set up in database

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) usePushNotifications.js line 18 uses 'customerToken' (correct), 2) CustomerLayout.jsx line 64 uses '/api/customer/profile' (correct), 3) PWA install banners have data-testid='pwa-install-banner' (customer) and data-testid='mr-install-banner' (MR). Note: PWA install banners only show when beforeinstallprompt event fires (browser-specific). Customer portal routes: /portal/* (dashboard, profile, etc). Login at /customer/login stores token as 'customerToken' in localStorage.
